subject: [SDNC] SDNR WT deployment option
commit_message:
[SDNC] SDNR WT deployment option

Add SDNRWT variable for onap-sdnc container in kubernetes/sdnc/templates/statefulset.yaml
Add commented sdnr_wt as usage example kubernetes/sdnc/values.yaml

Issue-ID: CCSDK-2790
Signed-off-by: g.wielgosins <g.wielgosins@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I731cc706595549e9de866f3415e9bb4179411b60

Patch Set 4:

I've got two "issues" here (not technical ones):

* I don't know what's SDNR WT deployment option. So I'd like a (lot) longer commit message that explains what's SDNR WT and the consequences to enable it. There have been a lot of new features in SDNC and I believe a doc explaining all of them is important. And as OOM is the part where it's configured, this doc should be either on OOM side or there's a link on OOM doc to this doc

* integration e2e tests are not compatible with new SDNC (issue is on Integration side) so we can't really check that e2e tests are still working. Not SDNC fault but I'd like to wait a little bit before merging in order to have new compliant tests
Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 4:

oom_redeploy (pnf registrate should work)
